commands.review_summary:
The branch adds default-off `messages.strandedReplyRecovery`, a one-shot follow-up retry for stranded `message_tool_only` finals, stronger system-prompt guidance, config/docs/schema entries, unit tests, and a qa-lab recovery scenario.

PR surface: Source +99, Tests +125, Docs +147, Generated 0. Total +371 across 13 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main logs a substantive private `message_tool_only` final and suppresses delivery without any recovery enqueue, and the linked report supplies production trace context. I did not run a live current-main channel repro in this read-only review.
